svg.text: Opening, middlegame, and endgame over one object
initial-represented-subset:2026-04-11-fixture-004 · preset switches move camera and anchor without changing diagram family
QGD Bogo-Indian A at full material. The farther stance
keeps early branch identity readable without leaving
Italian Branch Lab at the branch-rich middle. This
keeps the current camera grammar baseline while
Endgame Simplification Lab in the simplified region.
The closer stance tightens on terminal-facing
Each panel is the same graph object under a different anchor and camera stance. Opening should read as full-material branching, middlegame
as branch-rich local complexity, and endgame as simplified routing without turning into a different diagram family.
Entrypoints change anchor and emphasis only. Carrier semantics and label grammar stay continuous across all three views.
